tiles.name: Niches
tiles.description: Public Finance institution types and market niches

institutions.name: Ministry of Finance / Treasury
institutions.description: Central authority responsible for fiscal policy, national budgeting, and sovereign debt issuance.

functions.name: Sovereign Debt Management
functions.description: Managing sovereign bond issuance, debt portfolio risk, and primary dealer coordination.

functions.name: Fiscal Budget Planning
functions.description: Designing annual national budgets, medium-term expenditure frameworks, and fiscal rule compliance.

functions.name: Public Expenditure Management
functions.description: Monitoring government spending efficiency, program evaluation, and cost-benefit analysis.

functions.name: Treasury Cash Management
functions.description: Optimizing government liquidity, daily cash monitoring, and short-term borrowing.

institutions.name: Central Bank
institutions.description: Monetary authority responsible for price stability and financial system supervision.

functions.name: Monetary Policy Implementation
functions.description: Executing interest rate policy, open market operations, and liquidity provision.

functions.name: Financial Stability Supervision
functions.description: Monitoring systemic banking risks, macroprudential policy design, and stress testing.

functions.name: Foreign Reserve Management
functions.description: Managing national foreign currency reserves, gold reserves, and FX market intervention.

functions.name: Currency Operations
functions.description: Overseeing currency issuance, banknote production, cash distribution, and counterfeit prevention.

institutions.name: International Monetary Fund (IMF)
institutions.description: Global institution providing financial support during sovereign debt crises.

functions.name: Sovereign Lending Programs
functions.description: Designing macroeconomic adjustment programs and managing financial assistance.

functions.name: Debt Sustainability Analysis
functions.description: Evaluating sovereign debt sustainability and risk scenario modeling.

functions.name: Financial Sector Advisory
functions.description: Advising governments on banking sector reforms and capital adequacy.

functions.name: Global Economic Surveillance
functions.description: Publishing world economic outlook, financial stability reports, and macro risk monitoring.

institutions.name: Tax & Customs Administration
institutions.description: Government agency responsible for collecting taxes and enforcing customs laws.

functions.name: Revenue Mobilization
functions.description: Tax base expansion, compliance monitoring, and digital tax administration.

functions.name: Tax Audit & Enforcement
functions.description: Corporate and personal tax audits, evasion investigation, and international cooperation.

functions.name: Border Trade Enforcement
functions.description: Customs duty collection, border inspections, anti-smuggling operations, and trade fraud prevention.

functions.name: Tax Policy Reform
functions.description: Designing tax reforms, VAT gap analysis, tax base modeling, and revenue forecasting.

tiles.name: Jobs
tiles.description: Career roles and positions in Public Finance

tiles.name: Tasks
tiles.description: Key activities and responsibilities in Public Finance
